name: Upload modbus2mqtt local settings
description: POSTs a 'Download Local Settings' ZIP (busses, slaves, local specifications) to the application's import endpoint after start. Bootstrap-only: refused with 409 if the local config dir is already populated. Tries unauthenticated first; on 401 falls back to OIDC client_credentials.

parameters.name: modbus2mqtt local settings ZIP
parameters.description: ZIP file produced by 'Download Local Settings' (https://<host>:<port>/specifications). Contains busses, slaves and local specifications. secrets.yaml is intentionally excluded — set MQTT credentials via the UI after first boot.

parameters.name: REST Base URL
parameters.description: Base URL of the application REST API (relative to the container).

parameters.name: REST Endpoint Path
parameters.description: Path of the local-settings import endpoint.

parameters.name: REST Payload (base64)
parameters.description: Base64-encoded ZIP payload. Defaults to the uploaded ZIP content.

parameters.name: REST Content-Type
parameters.description: Content-Type header sent with the POST.

parameters.name: Health Endpoint Path
parameters.description: Path polled until the application reports readiness.

parameters.name: HTTPS Port
parameters.description: Application HTTPS port inside the container.

parameters.name: OIDC Issuer URL
parameters.description: Zitadel issuer for OIDC fallback (provided by addon-oidc).

parameters.name: OIDC Client ID
parameters.description: OIDC client ID for client_credentials fallback (provided by addon-oidc).

parameters.name: OIDC Client Secret
parameters.description: OIDC client secret for client_credentials fallback (provided by addon-oidc).
